$description.$value: Min/max width for the page-container component in the Figma library, at the 2xl (extra-extra-large) viewport. Mode-scoped: resolves to the 2xl range when the 2xl viewport mode is active.

min_width.$description: Minimum width of a page container in the 2xl viewport.

max_width.$description: Maximum width of a page container in the 2xl viewport. The 2xl range is open-ended; 99999px is an open-ended sentinel, not a real breakpoint.
